violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Shakers and condiments found under the hand wash sink paper towels.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. -Single use plastic spoon found stored in Chipotle sauce found in cooler at the time of inspection

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. -At time of inspection in-use fly strips were found in the rear storage area around single-use items and shelf stable food.
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
